content:
- completed story-19 task 02: setup-sql now emits explicit Cockroach cursor-capture plus cursor-parameterized changefeed SQL, runner test support consumes the public setup-sql binary instead of the crate, and setup-sql config ownership is split into Cockroach/Postgres-specific modules with shared table-name parsing
- final verification is green: make check passed, make lint passed, make test passed; make test-long was intentionally not run because this task is not a story-end / long-lane task
- marked the task done with <passes>true</passes>, ran .ralph/task_switch.sh, committed all changes in 67d5467, and pushed master to origin
- should do next: stop here
